before.title: Before you start:
before.usb: Enable USB Debugging on your Android.
before.cable: Connect the phone with a USB cable (the original is best).
before.unlocked: Keep the phone screen unlocked during the whole process.
before.connectNow: Now connect the phone to the computer

running.subtitle: Don't close this window. It takes between 5 and 15 minutes.

error.title: Something went wrong:
error.browserOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app.

done.title: ✓ Analysis complete
done.subtitle: The data has been saved to your Downloads folder.
